{{Infobox location
| name = Stormrock
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Stormrock Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Stormrock is a massive floating city constructed from obsidian and dark stone, situated atop a large green cloudbank. Resembling a jagged fortress in the sky, its architecture features sharp, peaked buildings and tall towers. The city is highly populated, housing nearly two million inhabitants including families, merchants, farmers, and approximately five thousand [[Skysworn]] or trainees. It also serves as a headquarters for the [[Redflower family]] during emergencies. Maintaining the city's flight requires a significant amount of wind scales and the assistance of many Underlords specialized in wind and cloud [[Paths]]. The [[Skysworn]] maintain a presence there, with their headquarters located in the [[Starsweep Tower]], the tallest structure in the city. Stormrock is built with protective [[scripts]] designed to withstand extreme conditions, such as the presence of a [[Dreadgod]] or intense battles. The city's streets are diverse, hosting various [[Paths]] and unique entities, ranging from people utilizing multiple tentacles for movement to sentient animals. The city is capable of rapid acceleration and can be moved by its occupants.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Stormrock serves as the cloudship city for the [[Skysworn]], consisting of obsidian buildings that require wind scales to remain airborne. The massive location maintains a population of nearly two million people and houses approximately five thousand [[Skysworn]] or trainees. Within its structures, the city maintains detailed records of cloudship departures as it travels across the sky. During its journey, Stormrock is set to pass over [[Serpent's Grave]] and serves as the location [[Cassias]] has recently departed. Even after the [[Dreadgod]]'s scream had quieted, the city continued rushing away.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] is the name of the [[Skysworn]]'s cloudship city.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] is a city of obsidian buildings that costs wind scales to keep aloft.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] has a population of almost two million people when needed.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] contains about five thousand [[Skysworn]] or trainees.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] is a city with records of cloudship departures.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] will pass over [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Stormrock]] is a location [[Cassias]] recently left.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Dreadgod]]'s scream had quieted, but [[Stormrock]] was still rushing away.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher Gesha]]'s family set up a [[Soulsmith]]'s shop in the floating city of [[Stormrock]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Stormrock]] is a floating city.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Stormrock]] is the location of the [[Starsweep Tower]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Gwei]] dumped [[Yerin]] and [[Eithan]] out of [[Stormrock]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Stormrock]] is a [[Skysworn]] city located near Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Stormrock]] has protective [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“We call this city Stormrock,” she said, as they walked past row after row of tall obsidian buildings. Costs a fortune in wind scales to keep it aloft every second.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
